BANNER.TEXT: Your support has the power to transform lives in a concrete and lasting way. Every act of generosity helps feed a hungry child, treat a patient without resources, provide shelter to a family in need, or give access to education to a young person without a future.

ABOUT.SUBTITLE: About Us
ABOUT.TITLE: Humanitarian Aid in Tunisia
ABOUT.TEXT1: The association TUNISIA CHARITY تونس الخيرية is a non-governmental non-profit organization. It aims to serve society by mobilizing the efforts of benefactors to solve the problems of their communities and help those in need.
ABOUT.TEXT2: The association works in emergency relief, sustainable development, and the fight against poverty. It also promotes the spirit of cooperation and solidarity within society.

SERVICE.SUBTITLE: Our Actions
SERVICE.TITLE: We believe we can save more lives with you

EDUCATION.TITLE: Children Education Support
EDUCATION.DESC: Providing school supplies and educational support for orphaned children.

WATER.TITLE: Clean Water
WATER.DESC: Ensuring access to clean and safe drinking water.

SPONSORSHIP.TITLE: Child Sponsorship
SPONSORSHIP.DESC: Finding sponsors to support children in need.

POVERTY.TITLE: Fight Against Poverty
POVERTY.DESC: Supporting vulnerable families with material, educational, and social aid.

EMERGENCY.TITLE: Humanitarian Emergency
EMERGENCY.DESC: Immediate assistance to crisis victims with food, shelter, and care.

CAUSES.TITLE: Let's explore the different projects in our association
